overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a narrow industrial alleyway at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features concrete walls with metal fencing, atmospheric teal lighting, and a prominent red overhead pipe structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley between concrete warehouses

tall concrete wall with metal fixtures and graffiti

metal security fencing atop the right wall
large red cylindrical pipe structure spanning the alley overhead
yellow-orange wall-mounted lights illuminating the left wall
sparse tufts of grass and weeds growing along the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking down a narrow industrial alley at night. Concrete walls rise on both sides topped with metal fencing, while warm lights cast pools of yellow illumination against the cool blue night. A red industrial pipe structure is visible in the distance overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: night sky view from industrial alley

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the full moon and starry night sky
camera tilts back down to forward-facing position

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to observe the moon and stars between the alley walls

entered.detail: dark blue night sky visible between the alley walls
bright full moon visible in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the night sky between the industrial walls, showing a bright full moon and stars against the dark blue atmosphere. The concrete walls frame the bottom of the shot while the metal fences silhouette against the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley approaching overhead pipe bridge

events.description: passing underneath the large red industrial pipe structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the alley and passing under the overhead pipe structure

entered.detail: large red cylindrical pipe structure spanning the alley overhead
sparse tufts of grass along the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to forward-facing and approaches the red industrial pipe bridge. The pipe grows larger in the frame as the camera walks underneath it around the 24-second mark, transitioning from approaching to passing beneath the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley beyond the pipe structure

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the alley past the overhead pipe, continuing toward distant lights

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the red pipe, the camera continues walking down the endless industrial alley. The concrete walls and metal fences continue into the distance with warm lights periodically illuminating the path, while the red pipe structure recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow industrial alleyway that transitions from a grounded walk to a celestial gaze before passing under a massive overhead structure. It begins by moving between concrete walls topped with metal fencing, where pools of warm yellow light contrast with the cool blue tones of the night. As the camera tilts upward, the industrial walls frame a view of a bright full moon and stars set against a dark blue atmosphere. The perspective then returns forward to approach a prominent red industrial pipe bridge, growing larger in the frame until the camera passes directly beneath it. Finally, the scene continues along the endless alley as the red structure recedes behind, leaving the path illuminated by periodic warm lights stretching into the distance.
